subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath revealed unto him who hath attained, time after time and again and again, unto verses that no books can equal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن فاز مره بعد مره و کره بعد کره بایات لاتعادلها کتب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
